```{r visualization by compounds orga}
    limits = c("new", "EOL")
  ) +
  #scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = Color_real_FN5) +
  facet_wrap(~compounds, scales = "free_y") +
  ## add some headroom above the tallest bar/errorbar
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(
    x = "Fishing nets",
    y = "Average concentration (µg/L)",
    fill = "Fishing net",
    pattern = "State"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"#, vjust = -4,
                                #margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)
                                ),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"#, vjust = -4,
                                #margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)
                                ),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    strip.text   = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5)),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"#, vjust = -4,
                                #margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)
                                ),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right"#,
    #aspect.ratio = 1/2,
    #plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0.3, 0, 0.7, 0.7), "cm")
  ) +
  rotate_x_text(40)


Gcp_no_corr +
  geom_text(
    data = results_KW_lab,
    aes(x = FN, y = y_top, label = label, group = state, hjust = if_else(state == "new", 0.7, 
                    if_else(state == "EOL", -0.3, 0))),
    position = pos_dodge,
    size = 4
    ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "4-tert-Octylphenol",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(3.88, 5.88, 6.88),
      xmax       = c(4.12, 6.12, 7.12),
      y.position = c(5, 8.5, 13),
      label      = c("**", "***", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Anthracene",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(1.88, 5.88),
      xmax       = c(2.12, 6.12),
      y.position = c(0.5, 2.7),
      label      = c("*", "****")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "ATBC",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(3.88, 5.88),
      xmax       = c(4.12, 6.12),
      y.position = c(30, 28),
      label      = c("**", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Benzo[a]anthracene",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(1.88, 5.88),
      xmax       = c(2.12, 6.12),
      y.position = c(1.3, 2.1),
      label      = c("*", "***")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Benzo[b+k]fluoranthene",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(5.88, 7.88),
      xmax       = c(6.12, 8.12),
      y.position = c(3.3, 1.8),
      label      = c("**", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Biphenyl",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(4.88),
      xmax       = c(5.12),
      y.position = c(2.5),
      label      = c("**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Chrysene",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(5.88),
      xmax       = c(6.12),
      y.position = c(7),
      label      = c("*")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "DEHA",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(5.88),
      xmax       = c(6.12),
      y.position = c(160),
      label      = c("*")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Naphthalene",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(5.88, 6.88),
      xmax       = c(6.12, 7.12),
      y.position = c(38, 24),
      label      = c("****", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Phenanthrene",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(2.88, 5.88),
      xmax       = c(3.12, 6.12),
      y.position = c(13, 50),
      label      = c("**", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) 


```


```{r visualization by compounds metals}
df_prepa_raw <- data_avg_corr %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "acenaphtene" ~ "Acenaphtene",
      compounds == "acenaphtylene" ~ "Acenaphtylene",
      compounds == "anthracene" ~ "Anthracene",
      compounds == "benzo(ghi)péryléne" ~ "Benzo(ghi)perylene",
      compounds == "benzo[b+k]fluoranthene" ~ "Benzo[b+k]fluoranthene",
      compounds == "benzoaanthracene" ~ "Benzo[a]anthracene",
      compounds == "benzoepyrene" ~ "Benzo[e]pyrene",
      compounds == "benzothiophene" ~ "Benzothiophene",
      compounds == "biphenyl" ~ "Biphenyl",
      compounds == "chrysene" ~ "Chrysene",
      compounds == "dibenzoahanthracene" ~ "Dibenzo[a,h]anthracene",
      compounds == "fluoranthene" ~ "Fluoranthene",
      compounds == "fluorene" ~ "Fluorene",
      compounds == "indeno123cdpyrene" ~ "Indeno[1,2,3-cd]pyrene",
      compounds == "naphtalene" ~ "Naphtalene",
      compounds == "pyrene" ~ "Pyrene",
      compounds == "4-tOP" ~ "4-tert-Octylphenol",
      compounds == "Nonylphénols" ~ "Nonylphenols",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = factor(compounds, levels = c(
      "Acenaphtene", "Acenaphtylene", "Anthracene", "Benzo[e]pyrene", "Benzo(ghi)perylene", "Benzo[b+k]fluoranthene", "Benzo[a]anthracene", "Benzothiophene", "Biphenyl", "Chrysene", "Dibenzo[a,h]anthracene", "Dibenzothiophene", "Fluoranthene", "Fluorene", "Indeno[1,2,3-cd]pyrene", "Phenanthrene", "Naphtalene", "Pyrene",
      "BDE 28", "BDE 47", "BDE 99", "BDE 100", "BDE 153", "BDE 154", "BDE 183",
      "ATBC", "BBP", "DBP", "DEHA", "DEHP", "DEP", "DMP",
      "4-tert-Octylphenol", "Nonylphenols", "Ag", "As", "Al", "Fe", "Cu", "Mn", "Zn"))) %>% 
  mutate(state = if_else(is.na(state), "blank", state)) %>%
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL")))  
df_prepa_raw

#graph without blank correction
df_prepa_raw <- data_avg_corr %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "acenaphtene" ~ "Acenaphtene",
      compounds == "acenaphtylene" ~ "Acenaphtylene",
      compounds == "anthracene" ~ "Anthracene",
      compounds == "benzo(ghi)péryléne" ~ "Benzo(ghi)perylene",
      compounds == "benzo[b+k]fluoranthene" ~ "Benzo[b+k]fluoranthene",
      compounds == "benzoaanthracene" ~ "Benzo[a]anthracene",
      compounds == "benzoepyrene" ~ "Benzo[e]pyrene",
      compounds == "benzothiophene" ~ "Benzothiophene",
      compounds == "biphenyl" ~ "Biphenyl",
      compounds == "chrysene" ~ "Chrysene",
      compounds == "dibenzoahanthracene" ~ "Dibenzo[a,h]anthracene",
      compounds == "fluoranthene" ~ "Fluoranthene",
      compounds == "fluorene" ~ "Fluorene",
      compounds == "indeno123cdpyrene" ~ "Indeno[1,2,3-cd]pyrene",
      compounds == "naphtalene" ~ "Naphtalene",
      compounds == "pyrene" ~ "Pyrene",
      compounds == "4-tOP" ~ "4-tert-Octylphenol",
      compounds == "Nonylphénols" ~ "Nonylphenols",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = factor(compounds, levels = c(
      "Acenaphtene", "Acenaphtylene", "Anthracene", "Benzo[e]pyrene", "Benzo(ghi)perylene", "Benzo[b+k]fluoranthene", "Benzo[a]anthracene", "Benzothiophene", "Biphenyl", "Chrysene", "Dibenzo[a,h]anthracene", "Dibenzothiophene", "Fluoranthene", "Fluorene", "Indeno[1,2,3-cd]pyrene", "Phenanthrene", "Naphtalene", "Pyrene",
      "BDE 28", "BDE 47", "BDE 99", "BDE 100", "BDE 153", "BDE 154", "BDE 183",
      "ATBC", "BBP", "DBP", "DEHA", "DEHP", "DEP", "DMP",
      "4-tert-Octylphenol", "Nonylphenols", "Ag", "As", "Al", "Fe", "Cu", "Mn", "Zn"))) %>% 
  mutate(state = if_else(is.na(state), "blank", state)) %>%
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) 
df_prepa_raw

tt_results_Gcp <- tt_results_cp %>%  dplyr::select(FN, compounds, diff) %>% 
  # duplicate each row exactly 2 times
  slice(rep(row_number(), each = 2)) %>% 
  # create the new variable with values "new" and "EOL"
  mutate(state = rep(c("new", "EOL"), times = nrow(tt_results_cp))) %>% 
  #mutate(diff = if_else(state == "new", "ns", diff)) %>% 
  arrange(compounds) %>% 
  group_by(compounds) %>% 
  filter(any(diff != "ns")) %>%  # keep compounds with at least one non-"ns"
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "acenaphtene" ~ "Acenaphtene",
      compounds == "acenaphtylene" ~ "Acenaphtylene",
      compounds == "anthracene" ~ "Anthracene",
      compounds == "benzo(ghi)péryléne" ~ "Benzo(ghi)perylene",
      compounds == "benzo[b+k]fluoranthene" ~ "Benzo[b+k]fluoranthene",
      compounds == "benzoaanthracene" ~ "Benzo[a]anthracene",
      compounds == "benzoepyrene" ~ "Benzo[e]pyrene",
      compounds == "benzothiophene" ~ "Benzothiophene",
      compounds == "biphenyl" ~ "Biphenyl",
      compounds == "chrysene" ~ "Chrysene",
      compounds == "dibenzoahanthracene" ~ "Dibenzo[a,h]anthracene",
      compounds == "fluoranthene" ~ "Fluoranthene",
      compounds == "fluorene" ~ "Fluorene",
      compounds == "indeno123cdpyrene" ~ "Indeno[1,2,3-cd]pyrene",
      compounds == "naphtalene" ~ "Naphtalene",
      compounds == "pyrene" ~ "Pyrene",
      compounds == "4-tOP" ~ "4-tert-Octylphenol",
      compounds == "Nonylphénols" ~ "Nonylphenols",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) 
tt_results_Gcp


#-------------------Plot with blank correction-------------

results_KW_lab <- results_KW_nblc_cp  %>% 
  mutate(y_top = case_when(
      compounds == "Ag" & state == "new" ~ 50,
      compounds == "Ag" & state == "EOL" ~ 55,
      # compounds == "Al" & state == "new" ~ 300,
      # compounds == "Al" & state == "EOL" ~ 320,
      # compounds == "As" & state == "new" ~ 110,
      compounds == "As" & state == "EOL" ~ 130,
      compounds == "Cu" & state == "new" ~ 880,
      compounds == "Cu" & state == "EOL" ~ 1000,
      compounds == "Fe" & state == "new" ~ 360,
      compounds == "Fe" & state == "EOL" ~ 410,
      compounds == "Mn" & state == "new" ~ 155,
      compounds == "Mn" & state == "EOL" ~ 180,
      compounds == "Zn" & state == "new" ~ 1500,
      compounds == "Zn" & state == "EOL" ~ 1700,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>% 
  #change order state
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>% 
  na.omit()

results_KW_lab

Gcp_no_corr <- df_cp_stat %>% 
  filter(FN != "blank") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = FN, y = avg_corr, fill = FN, pattern = state, group = state)) +
  geom_bar_pattern(
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.5,
    position = pos_dodge,
    pattern_density = 0.15,
    pattern_fill = "white",
    pattern_color = "white",
    pattern_spacing = 0.04,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = avg_corr, ymax = avg_corr + sd_corr),
    position = pos_dodge,
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_pattern_discrete(
    na.value = "none",
    choices = c("new" = "none", "EOL" = "stripe"),
    limits = c("new", "EOL")
  ) +
  #scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = Color_real_FN5) +
  facet_wrap(~compounds, scales = "free_y") +
  ## add some headroom above the tallest bar/errorbar
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(
    x = "Fishing net",
    y = "Average concentration (µg/L)",
    fill = "Fishing net",
    pattern = "State"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = -4,
                                margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 4,
                                margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    strip.text   = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5)),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 1,
                                margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 10, l = 0)),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm")
  ) +
  rotate_x_text(30)

tt_results_cp_plot <- tt_results_cp %>% 
  filter(compounds %in% c("Ag", "As", "Al", "Fe", "Cu", "Mn", "Zn")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(FN, compounds, diff) %>% 
  filter(diff != "ns") %>% 
  arrange(compounds)
tt_results_cp_plot

Gcp_no_corr +
  geom_text(
    data = results_KW_lab,
    aes(x = FN, y = y_top, label = label, group = state, hjust = if_else(state == "new", 0.7, 
                    if_else(state == "EOL", 0, 0))),
    position = pos_dodge,
    size = 4
    ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Ag",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(5.88, 6.88),
      xmax       = c(6.12, 7.12),
      y.position = c(37, 14),
      label      = c("***", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "As",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(5.88),
      xmax       = c(6.12),
      y.position = c(30),
      label      = c("**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Cu",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(5.88, 6.88),
      xmax       = c(6.12, 7.12),
      y.position = c(435, 500),
      label      = c("***", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
    ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Mn",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(0.88, 5.88, 6.88),
      xmax       = c(1.12, 6.12, 7.12),
      y.position = c(125, 135, 75),
      label      = c("**", "****", "*")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
    ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Zn",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(5.88, 6.88),
      xmax       = c(6.12, 7.12),
      y.position = c(1250, 600),
      label      = c("****", "****")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 4,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) 

```


```{r visualization by large categories orga + metals no publi}

G_avg_corr_cat <- metal_orga %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Trace metals",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = factor(compounds, levels = c(
      "PAHs", "PBDEs", "Phthalates", "Alkylphenols", "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Trace metals"))) %>%
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>%
  filter(compounds != "Alkylphenols", FN != "blank") %>%
  mutate(compounds = if_else(compounds == "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Alkylphenols", compounds)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = state, y = values_corr, color = compounds, shape = rep, group = compounds)) + 
  scale_y_log10(
    breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000),          # Set your desired breaks
    labels = label_number(trim = TRUE)           # Remove scientific format
  ) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), 
    size = 4) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(19, 18, 17)) + 
  #scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "PAHs" = "#1ae4b6",              # Dark goldenrod
      "PBDEs" = "#4686fb",             # Steel blue
      "Phthalates" = "#faba39",        # Vivid red
      "Alkylphenols" = "#770000",      # Strong green
      "Trace metals" = "#B12090FF"      # Strong green
    )) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = Color_real_FN5) +
  facet_wrap(~FN) +
  labs(#title = "Concentrations of organic compounds in fishing net extracts",
       #subtitle = "Values corrected by average blank (n = 4) subtraction\n",
       x = "State of the FNs", 
       y = "Average concentration (µg/L)", 
       fill = "Organic compounds") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = -4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = 'bold'),
        title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 20, l = 0)),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5)),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey", color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1),
        legend.title= element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 10, l = 0)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.position="right",
        panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 2, 1), "cm")) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(title = "Plastic chemical \ncategories", order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Replicates", order = 2))
G_avg_corr_cat

G_avg_corr_cat2 <- metal_orga %>% 
  #avg and sd with reframe
  group_by(FN, state, compounds) %>%
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    avg_corr = mean(values_corr, na.rm = T),
    sd_corr = sd(values_corr, na.rm = T)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr = if_else(avg_corr <1, avg_corr+1, avg_corr),
         sd_corr = if_else(sd_corr <1, sd_corr+1, sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr_log = log10(avg_corr),
         sd_corr_log = log10(sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Metallic elements",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = factor(compounds, levels = c(
      "PAHs", "PBDEs", "Phthalates", "Alkylphenols", "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Metallic elements"))) %>%
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>%
  filter(compounds != "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", 
         #FN != "blank"
         ) %>%
  #mutate(compounds = if_else(compounds == "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Alkylphenols", compounds)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = state, y = avg_corr, 
             fill = compounds 
             #shape = rep, 
             #group = compounds
             )) + 
  scale_y_log10(
    breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000),          # Set your desired breaks
    labels = label_number(trim = TRUE)           # Remove scientific format
  ) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), 
    width = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = avg_corr, ymax = if_else(avg_corr > 1, avg_corr + sd_corr, avg_corr)), 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), 
                width = 0.2) + 
  #scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "PAHs" = "#1ae4b6",              # Dark goldenrod
      "PBDEs" = "#4686fb",             # Steel blue
      "Phthalates" = "#faba39",        # Vivid red
      "Alkylphenols" = "#770000",      # Strong green
      "Metallic elements" = "#B12090FF"      # Strong green
    )) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = Color_real_FN5) +
  facet_wrap(~FN) +
  labs(#title = "Concentrations of organic compounds in fishing net extracts",
       #subtitle = "Values corrected by average blank (n = 4) subtraction\n",
       x = "State of the FNs", 
       y = "Average concentration (µg/L)", 
       fill = "Organic compounds") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = -4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = 'bold'),
        title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 20, l = 0)),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5)),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey", color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1),
        legend.title= element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 10, l = 0)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.position="right",
        panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 2, 1), "cm")) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(title = "Plastic chemical \ncategories", order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Replicates", order = 2))
G_avg_corr_cat2

G_avg_corr_cat3 <- metal_orga %>% 
  #avg and sd with reframe
  group_by(FN, state, compounds) %>%
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    avg_corr = mean(values_corr, na.rm = T),
    sd_corr = sd(values_corr, na.rm = T)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr = if_else(avg_corr <1, avg_corr+1, avg_corr),
         sd_corr = if_else(sd_corr <1, sd_corr+1, sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr_log = log10(avg_corr),
         sd_corr_log = log10(sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "Metals" ~ "Metallic elements",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = factor(compounds, levels = c(
      "PAHs", "PBDEs", "Phthalates", "Non phthalate plasticizers" ,"Alkylphenols", "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Metallic elements"))) %>%
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>%
  filter(compounds != "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", 
         #FN != "blank"
         ) %>%
  #mutate(compounds = if_else(compounds == "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Alkylphenols", compounds)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = FN, y = avg_corr, 
             fill = FN, 
             pattern = state, 
             #group = compounds
             )) + 
  # scale_y_log10(
  #   breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000),          # Set your desired breaks
  #   labels = label_number(trim = TRUE)           # Remove scientific format
  # ) +
  geom_bar_pattern(stat = "identity", width = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), pattern_density = 0.1, 
                   pattern_fill = "white", pattern_color = "white", pattern_spacing = 0.015, show.legend = T) +
  scale_pattern_discrete(na.value = "none", 
                         choices = c("new" = "none", "EOL" = "stripe"), 
                         limits = c("new", "EOL")) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = avg_corr, ymax = if_else(avg_corr > 1, avg_corr + sd_corr, avg_corr)), 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), linewidth = 1, width = 0.2) + 
  facet_wrap(~compounds, scales = "free_y") +
  #scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = Color_real_FN5) +
  labs(#title = "Concentrations of organic compounds in fishing net extracts",
       #subtitle = "Values corrected by average blank (n = 4) subtraction\n",
       x = "Fishing nets", 
       y = "Average concentration (µg/L)", 
       fill = "Fishing nets",
       pattern = "FN state") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = -4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = 'bold'),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5)),
        #strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey", color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1),
        legend.title= element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 10, l = 0)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.position="right",
        #panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm")) +
  rotate_x_text(angle = 30)
  #coord_flip()
G_avg_corr_cat3

tt_results_G <- tt_results %>%  dplyr::select(FN, compounds, diff) %>% 
  # duplicate each row exactly 2 times
  slice(rep(row_number(), each = 2)) %>% 
  # create the new variable with values "new" and "EOL"
  mutate(state = rep(c("new", "EOL"), times = nrow(tt_results))) %>% 
  mutate(diff = if_else(state == "new", "ns", diff)) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Trace metals",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      ))
tt_results_G

results_vs_blank2 <- results_vs_blank %>%
mutate(stars = if_else(compounds == "AKP", "ns", stars)) %>%
  mutate(y_stars = case_when(
           compounds == "AKP" ~ 4900,
           compounds == "HAP" ~ 190,
           compounds == "PBDE" ~ 10,
           compounds == "Metals" ~ 2100,
           compounds == "Phthalates" ~ 3500,
           compounds == "Non phthalate plasticizers" ~ 200,
           TRUE ~ NA_real_)) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "Metals" ~ "Metallic elements",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(stars = if_else(stars == "ns", NA, stars)) #%>% 
  #change order state
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL")))

G_avg_corr_cat3 +
  #add letter stats with results_KW df
    geom_text(
    data = results_vs_blank2,
    aes(x = FN, y = y_stars, label = stars, color = state),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.55),
    #hjust = -0.1,
    size = 5,
    color = "red4"
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "PAHs",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(1.88, 2.88, 6.88),
      xmax       = c(2.12, 3.12, 7.12),
      y.position = c(35, 35, 170),
      label      = c("*", "*", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 6,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.02, 0.02),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Non phthalate plasticizers",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(6.88),
      xmax       = c(7.12),
      y.position = c(190),
      label      = c("*")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 6,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.02, 0.02),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Metallic elements",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(6.88),
      xmax       = c(7.12),
      y.position = c(1850),
      label      = c("***")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 6,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.02, 0.02),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) 


```

```{r visualization by large categories orga + metals publi}

highlights <- metal_orga %>% 
  mutate(cat = if_else(compounds == "Metals", "Metals", "Organics")) %>%
  #avg and sd with reframe
  group_by(FN, state, cat) %>%
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    avg_corr = mean(values_corr, na.rm = T),
    sd_corr = sd(values_corr, na.rm = T)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr = if_else(avg_corr <1, avg_corr+1, avg_corr),
         sd_corr = if_else(sd_corr <1, sd_corr+1, sd_corr))
highlights

G_avg_corr_cat3 <- metal_orga %>% 
  #avg and sd with reframe
  group_by(FN, state, compounds) %>%
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    avg_corr = mean(values_corr, na.rm = T),
    sd_corr = sd(values_corr, na.rm = T)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr = if_else(avg_corr <1, avg_corr+1, avg_corr),
         sd_corr = if_else(sd_corr <1, sd_corr+1, sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr_log = log10(avg_corr),
         sd_corr_log = log10(sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "Metals" ~ "Metallic elements",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = factor(compounds, levels = c(
      "PAHs", "PBDEs", "Phthalates", "Non phthalate plasticizers" ,"Alkylphenols", "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Metallic elements"))) %>%
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>%
  filter(compounds != "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", 
         #FN != "blank"
         ) %>%
  #mutate(compounds = if_else(compounds == "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Alkylphenols", compounds)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = FN, y = avg_corr, 
             fill = FN, 
             pattern = state, 
             #group = compounds
             )) + 
  # scale_y_log10(
  #   breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000),          # Set your desired breaks
  #   labels = label_number(trim = TRUE)           # Remove scientific format
  # ) +
  geom_bar_pattern(stat = "identity", width = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), pattern_density = 0.1, 
                   pattern_fill = "white", pattern_color = "white", pattern_spacing = 0.015, show.legend = T) +
  scale_pattern_discrete(na.value = "none", 
                         choices = c("new" = "none", "EOL" = "stripe"), 
                         limits = c("new", "EOL")) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = avg_corr, ymax = if_else(avg_corr > 1, avg_corr + sd_corr, avg_corr)), 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), linewidth = 1, width = 0.2) + 
  facet_wrap(~compounds, scales = "free_y") +
  #scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = Color_real_FN5) +
  labs(#title = "Concentrations of organic compounds in fishing net extracts",
       #subtitle = "Values corrected by average blank (n = 4) subtraction\n",
       x = "Fishing nets", 
       y = "Average concentration (µg/L)", 
       fill = "Fishing nets",
       pattern = "FN state") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = -4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = 'bold'),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5)),
        #strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey", color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1),
        legend.title= element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 10, l = 0)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.position="right",
        #panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm")) +
  rotate_x_text(angle = 30)
  #coord_flip()
G_avg_corr_cat3

tt_results_G <- tt_results %>%  dplyr::select(FN, compounds, diff) %>% 
  # duplicate each row exactly 2 times
  slice(rep(row_number(), each = 2)) %>% 
  # create the new variable with values "new" and "EOL"
  mutate(state = rep(c("new", "EOL"), times = nrow(tt_results))) %>% 
  mutate(diff = if_else(state == "new", "ns", diff)) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Metallic elements",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  filter(diff != "ns")
tt_results_G

results_vs_blank2 <- results_blc_FN %>%
  mutate(stars = if_else(compounds == "AKP", "ns", stars)) %>%
  mutate(stars = if_else(compounds == "Metals" & FN == "PBS δ60" & state == "EOL", "#", stars)) %>% #manual modif car results of wilcox
  mutate(y_stars = case_when(
           compounds == "AKP" ~ 4900,
           compounds == "HAP" ~ 190,
           compounds == "PBDE" ~ 10,
           compounds == "Metals" ~ 2100,
           compounds == "Phthalates" ~ 3500,
           compounds == "Non phthalate plasticizers" ~ 200,
           TRUE ~ NA_real_)) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "Metals" ~ "Metallic elements",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(stars = if_else(stars == "ns", NA, stars)) %>% 
  #change order state
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL")))
results_vs_blank2

G_avg_corr_cat3 +
  #add letter stats with results_KW df
    geom_text(
    data = results_vs_blank2,
    aes(x = FN, y = y_stars, label = stars, color = state),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    #hjust = -0.1,
    size = 4,
    color = "red4"
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "PAHs",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(3.88, 2.88, 6.88),
      xmax       = c(4.12, 3.12, 7.12),
      y.position = c(52, 35, 170),
      label      = c("*", "*", "**")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 6,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.02, 0.02),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Non phthalate plasticizers",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(6.88),
      xmax       = c(7.12),
      y.position = c(190),
      label      = c("*")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 6,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.02, 0.02),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_bracket(
    data = tibble(
      compounds  = "Metallic elements",  # adapt to your facet name if needed
      xmin       = c(6.88),
      xmax       = c(7.12),
      y.position = c(1850),
      label      = c("***")
    ),
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, y.position = y.position, label = label),
    size       = 1.06,
    label.size = 6,
    vjust      = 0.3,
    tip.length = c(0.02, 0.02),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) 


```


```{r visualization by large categories orga}

#orga alone without blank correction
df_no_corr <- data_corr_cat %>% 
  mutate(state = if_else(is.na(state), "blank", state)) %>%
  #avg and sd with reframe
  group_by(FN, state, compounds) %>%
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    avg_corr = mean(values, na.rm = T),
    sd_corr = sd(values, na.rm = T)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr = if_else(avg_corr <1, avg_corr+1, avg_corr),
         sd_corr = if_else(sd_corr <1, sd_corr+1, sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr_log = log10(avg_corr),
         sd_corr_log = log10(sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Trace metals",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = factor(compounds, levels = c(
      "PAHs", "PBDEs", "Phthalates", "Alkylphenols", "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Trace metals"))) %>%
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>%
  filter(compounds != "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols") 
df_no_corr

G_avg_corr_cat4 <- df_no_corr %>% ggplot(aes(x = FN, y = avg_corr, 
             fill = FN, 
             pattern = state, 
             #group = compounds
             )) + 
  # scale_y_log10(
  #   breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000),          # Set your desired breaks
  #   labels = label_number(trim = TRUE)           # Remove scientific format
  # ) +
  geom_bar_pattern(stat = "identity", width = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), pattern_density = 0.1, 
                   pattern_fill = "white", pattern_color = "white", pattern_spacing = 0.015, show.legend = T) +
  scale_pattern_discrete(na.value = "none", 
                         choices = c("new" = "none", "EOL" = "stripe", "blank" = "circle"), 
                         limits = c("new", "EOL", "blank")) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = avg_corr, ymax = if_else(avg_corr > 1, avg_corr + sd_corr, avg_corr)), 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), linewidth = 1, width = 0.2) + 
  facet_wrap(~compounds, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  labs(#title = "Concentrations of organic compounds in fishing net extracts",
       #subtitle = "Values corrected by average blank (n = 4) subtraction\n",
       x = "Fishing nets", 
       y = "Average concentration (µg/L)", 
       fill = "Fishing nets", pattern = "Fishing net states") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = -4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = 'bold'),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5)),
        #strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey", color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1),
        legend.title= element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 10, l = 0)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.position="right",
        #panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 2, 1), "cm")) +
  rotate_x_text(angle = 30)
  #coord_flip()
G_avg_corr_cat4

# match names and states between tables
results_KW_lab <- results_KW_blc %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Trace metals",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(y_top = case_when(
      compounds == "PAHs" ~ 175,
      compounds == "PBDEs" ~ 11.5,
      compounds == "Phthalates" ~ 3700,
      compounds == "Alkylphenols" ~ 5000,
      compounds == "Trace metals" ~ 250,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>% 
  #delete lables all similar 
  mutate(label = case_when(
      compounds == "PBDEs" ~ NA,
      compounds == "Phthalates" ~ NA,
      TRUE ~ label
    )) %>% 
  mutate(label = case_when(
      compounds == "Alkylphenols" ~ NA,
      TRUE ~ label
    )) %>% 
  #change order state
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>% 
  na.omit()
  
results_KW_lab

tt_results_G <- tt_results %>%  dplyr::select(FN, compounds, diff) %>% 
  # duplicate each row exactly 2 times
  slice(rep(row_number(), each = 2)) %>% 
  # create the new variable with values "new" and "EOL"
  mutate(state = rep(c("new", "EOL"), times = nrow(tt_results))) %>% 
  mutate(diff = if_else(state == "new", "ns", diff)) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Trace metals",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      ))
tt_results_G

G_avg_corr_cat4 +
  #add letter stats with results_KW df
    geom_text(
    data = results_KW_lab,
    aes(x = FN, y = y_top+30, label = label, color = state),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    hjust = -0.1,
    size = 5,
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "red4")) + 
  guides(color = "none") +
  geom_bracket(aes(xmin = 2.88 , xmax= 3.12,
                           y.position = 55,
                           label = "*"),
               size = 1.1,
               label.size = 7,
               vjust = 0.3,
               tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
               data = subset(tt_results_G, compounds == "PAHs"),
               inherit.aes = FALSE
               ) +
  geom_bracket(aes(xmin = 3.88 , xmax= 4.12,
                             y.position = 55,
                             label = "*"),
                 size = 1.1,
                 label.size = 7,
                 vjust = 0.3,
                 tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
                 data = subset(tt_results_G, compounds == "PAHs"),
                 inherit.aes = FALSE
                 ) +
    geom_bracket(aes(xmin = 6.88 , xmax= 7.12,
                           y.position = 177,
                           label = "**"),
               size = 1.1,
               label.size = 7,
               vjust = 0.3,
               tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
               data = subset(tt_results_G, compounds == "PAHs"),
               inherit.aes = FALSE
               )

#orga alone with blank correction
df_corr_graph <- data_corr_cat %>% 
  mutate(state = if_else(is.na(state), "blank", state)) %>%
  #avg and sd with reframe
  group_by(FN, state, compounds) %>%
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    avg_corr = mean(values_corr, na.rm = T),
    sd_corr = sd(values_corr, na.rm = T)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr = if_else(avg_corr <1, avg_corr+1, avg_corr),
         sd_corr = if_else(sd_corr <1, sd_corr+1, sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(avg_corr_log = log10(avg_corr),
         sd_corr_log = log10(sd_corr)) %>%
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Trace metals",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = factor(compounds, levels = c(
      "PAHs", "PBDEs", "Phthalates", "Alkylphenols", "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", "Trace metals"))) %>%
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>%
  filter(compounds != "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols", FN != "blank")
df_corr_graph
 
G_avg_corr_cat5 <-  df_corr_graph %>% ggplot(aes(x = FN, y = avg_corr, 
             fill = FN, 
             pattern = state, 
             #group = compounds
             )) + 
  # scale_y_log10(
  #   breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000),          # Set your desired breaks
  #   labels = label_number(trim = TRUE)           # Remove scientific format
  # ) +
  geom_bar_pattern(stat = "identity", width = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), pattern_density = 0.1, 
                   pattern_fill = "white", pattern_color = "white", pattern_spacing = 0.015, show.legend = T) +
  scale_pattern_discrete(na.value = "none", 
                         choices = c("new" = "none", "EOL" = "stripe"), 
                         limits = c("new", "EOL")) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = avg_corr, ymax = if_else(avg_corr > 1, avg_corr + sd_corr, avg_corr)), 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), linewidth = 1, width = 0.2) + 
  facet_wrap(~compounds, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  labs(#title = "Concentrations of organic compounds in fishing net extracts",
       #subtitle = "Values corrected by average blank (n = 4) subtraction\n",
       x = "Fishing nets", 
       y = "Average concentration (µg/L)", 
       fill = "Fishing nets",
       pattern = "Fishing net states") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = -4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = 'bold'),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5)),
        #strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey", color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1),
        legend.title= element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 10, l = 0)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.position="right",
        #panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 2, 1), "cm")) +
  rotate_x_text(angle = 30)
  #coord_flip()
G_avg_corr_cat5

# match names and states between tables
results_KW_lab <- results_KW_nblc %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Trace metals",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      )) %>% 
  mutate(y_top = case_when(
      compounds == "Alkylphenols" ~ 4700,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>% 
  #delete lables all similar
  mutate(label = case_when(
      compounds == "PAHs" ~ NA,
      TRUE ~ label
    )) %>%
  mutate(label = case_when(
      compounds == "Alkylphenols" & state == "new" ~ NA,
      TRUE ~ label
    )) %>%
  #change order state
  mutate(state = factor(state, levels = c("blank", "new", "EOL"))) %>% 
  na.omit()
  
results_KW_lab

tt_results_G <- tt_results %>%  dplyr::select(FN, compounds, diff) %>% 
  # duplicate each row exactly 2 times
  slice(rep(row_number(), each = 2)) %>% 
  # create the new variable with values "new" and "EOL"
  mutate(state = rep(c("new", "EOL"), times = nrow(tt_results))) %>% 
  mutate(diff = if_else(state == "new", "ns", diff)) %>% 
  mutate(compounds = case_when(
      compounds == "AKP" ~ "Alkylphenols",
      compounds == "AKP_NP" ~ "Alkylphenols without Nonylphenols",
      compounds == "HAP" ~ "PAHs",
      compounds == "PBDE" ~ "PBDEs",
      compounds == "Phtalates" ~ "Phthalates",
      compounds == "metals" ~ "Trace metals",
      TRUE ~ compounds
      ))
tt_results_G

G_avg_corr_cat5 +
  #add letter stats with results_KW df
  #   geom_text(
  #   data = results_KW_lab,
  #   aes(x = FN, y = y_top, label = label, color = state),
  #   position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
  #   size = 5,
  # ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "red4")) + 
  guides(color = "none") +
  geom_bracket(aes(xmin = 1.88 , xmax= 2.12,
                           y.position = 50,
                           label = "*"),
               size = 1.1,
               label.size = 7,
               vjust = 0.3,
               tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
               data = subset(tt_results_G, compounds == "PAHs"),
               inherit.aes = FALSE
               ) +
  geom_bracket(aes(xmin = 2.88 , xmax= 3.12,
                             y.position = 50,
                             label = "*"),
                 size = 1.1,
                 label.size = 7,
                 vjust = 0.3,
                 tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
                 data = subset(tt_results_G, compounds == "PAHs"),
                 inherit.aes = FALSE
                 ) +
    geom_bracket(aes(xmin = 5.88 , xmax= 6.12,
                           y.position = 167,
                           label = "**"),
               size = 1.1,
               label.size = 7,
               vjust = 0.3,
               tip.length = c(0.03, 0.03),
               data = subset(tt_results_G, compounds == "PAHs"),
               inherit.aes = FALSE
               )

```

Compounds also found in leachates:
ATBC
DEP


Compounds not in new FN extracts (5/34):
benzo[b+k]fluoranthene
dibenzoahanthracene
BDE 100
BDE 153
BDE 183


Compounds not in EOL FN extracts (5/34):
benzothiophene
fluorene
indeno123cdpyrene
dibenzoahanthracene
BDE 28

```{r compounds insides}
# Comprehensive table of plastic-related compounds
inside_compounds <- tibble(
  CompoundName = c(
    "Naphthalene", "Benzothiophene", "Biphenyl", "Acenaphthylene", "Acenaphthene",
    "Fluorene", "Dibenzothiophene", "Phenanthrene", "Anthracene", "Fluoranthene",
    "Pyrene", "Benzo[a]anthracene", "Chrysene", "Benzo[b+k]fluoranthene", "Benzo[a]pyrene",
    "Indeno[1,2,3-cd]pyrene", "Dibenzo[a,h]anthracene", "Benzo[ghi]perylene",
    "BDE 28", "BDE 47", "BDE 100", "BDE 99", "BDE 154", "BDE 153", "BDE 183",
    "DMP", "DEP", "DBP", "BBP", "DEHA", "DEHP", "ATBC", "4-tOP", "Nonylphenols"
  ),
  MainUse = c(
    rep("Contaminant from combustion processes, coal tar, petroleum products", 18),
    rep("Flame retardant additive in plastics, electronics, textiles, and furniture foam", 7),
    "Plasticizer for cellulose acetate, vinyl resins, and other polymers",
    "Plasticizer for cellulose acetate, PVC, and other polymer applications",
    "Plasticizer for PVC, cellulose esters, synthetic rubber, and adhesives",
    "Plasticizer for PVC, vinyl flooring, wall coverings, and consumer products",
    "Plasticizer for PVC and other polymers; alternative to phthalates",
    "Primary plasticizer for PVC; most widely used phthalate plasticizer",
    "Non-phthalate plasticizer for PVC; eco-friendly alternative",
    "Antioxidant and stabilizer in rubber and plastic manufacturing; surfactant",
    "Surfactant production; antioxidant in rubber and plastics; resin modifier"
  ),
  Classification = c(
    rep("Priority pollutant (US EPA); persistent organic pollutant; combustion/industrial origin", 6),
    "Environmental contaminant; petroleum and combustion origin",
    rep("Priority pollutant (US EPA); persistent organic pollutant; combustion/industrial origin", 11),
    rep("Stockholm Convention POP candidate; banned/restricted flame retardant; industrial origin", 7),
    "REACH Candidate List substance; reproductive toxin; industrial additive origin",
    "REACH Candidate List substance; reproductive toxin; industrial additive origin",
    "REACH Candidate List substance; reproductive toxin; banned in toys; industrial origin",
    "REACH Candidate List substance; reproductive toxin; banned in toys; industrial origin",
    "Environmental contaminant; industrial additive origin",
    "REACH Candidate List substance; reproductive toxin; banned in toys; industrial origin",
    "Non-classified; considered safer alternative plasticizer; industrial additive origin",
    "Priority substance (EU WFD); endocrine disruptor; industrial origin",
    "Priority hazardous substance; endocrine disruptor; restricted use; industrial origin"
  ),
  Hazard = c(
    "Carcinogenic; toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Moderately toxic to aquatic organisms; potential carcinogen",
    "Toxic to aquatic organisms; endocrine disruptor; bioaccumulative",
    "Carcinogenic; toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Moderately toxic to aquatic organisms; suspected carcinogen",
    "Toxic to aquatic organisms; suspected carcinogen; bioaccumulative",
    "Moderately toxic to aquatic organisms; potential endocrine disruptor",
    "Carcinogenic; toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Carcinogenic; toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; phototoxic",
    "Carcinogenic; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Carcinogenic; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Carcinogenic; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Carcinogenic; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Carcinogenic; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Highly carcinogenic; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Probable carcinogen; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Carcinogenic; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    "Probable carcinogen; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; mutagenic",
    rep("Endocrine disruptor; thyroid hormone disruptor; neurotoxic; bioaccumulative; persistent", 7),
    "Reproductive toxin; endocrine disruptor; developmental toxin; aquatic toxicity",
    "Reproductive toxin; endocrine disruptor; developmental toxin; aquatic toxicity",
    "Reproductive toxin; anti-androgenic; developmental toxin; aquatic toxicity; banned in toys",
    "Reproductive toxin; anti-androgenic; carcinogenic; developmental toxin; high aquatic toxicity; banned in toys",
    "Lower toxicity than phthalates; minimal reproductive effects; aquatic toxicity",
    "Reproductive toxin; anti-androgenic; carcinogenic; developmental toxin; high aquatic toxicity; banned in toys",
    "Lower toxicity profile; considered safer alternative; minimal reproductive effects",
    "Endocrine disruptor; estrogenic activity; toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; restricted use",
    "Strong endocrine disruptor; estrogenic activity; highly toxic to aquatic organisms; bioaccumulative; priority hazardous substance"
  ))

inside_compounds

#export excel
# library(writexl)
# write_xlsx(inside_compounds, "inside_compounds.xlsx")
```

```{r leaching kinetics}
Op_time_FN <- rep(c(650, 2700, 2700, 624, 624, 624, 624, 12700, 
                       0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), each = 5)
Op_time_FN

avg_metal_orga_FN <- metal_orga %>% 
  group_by(FN, state, compounds) %>%
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    avg_corr = mean(values_corr, na.rm = T),
    sd_corr = sd(values_corr, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  filter(FN != "blank") %>% 
  arrange(state, FN) %>% 
  mutate(Op_time = Op_time_FN)
avg_metal_orga_FN

avg_metal_orga <- metal_orga %>% 
  filter(FN != "blank") %>% 
  mutate(Op_time = case_when(
    FN == "PA α35" & state == "EOL" ~ 650,
    FN == "PA β33" & state == "EOL" ~ 2700,
    FN == "PA β95" & state == "EOL" ~ 2700,
    FN == "PA γ33" & state == "EOL" ~ 624,
    FN == "PA γ60" & state == "EOL" ~ 624,
    FN == "PBS δ35" & state == "EOL" ~ 624,
    FN == "PBS δ60" & state == "EOL" ~ 624,
    FN == "PE-PP ε4.25" & state == "EOL" ~ 624,
    TRUE ~ 0
  )) %>% 
  group_by(state, Op_time, compounds) %>%
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    avg_corr = mean(values_corr, na.rm = T),
    sd_corr = sd(values_corr, na.rm = T))  
avg_metal_orga


G_leach_kinetics <- avg_metal_orga_FN %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Op_time, y = avg_corr, 
             color = compounds, 
             group = interaction(compounds))) + 
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  # scale_y_log10(
  #   breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000),          # Set your desired breaks
  #   labels = label_number(trim = TRUE)           # Remove scientific format
  # ) +
  facet_wrap(~FN, scales = "free") +
  labs(title = "Leaching kinetics of plastic-associated compounds from fishing nets",
       x = "State of the FNs", 
       y = "Average concentration (µg/L)", 
       color = "Plastic chemical categories",
       shape = "Fishing nets") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = -4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 4, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 0)),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = 'bold'),
        title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 20, l = 0)),
        legend.title= element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", vjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 10, l = 0)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, 'cm'),
        legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
        legend.position="right",
        panel.spacing = unit(2, "lines"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 2, 1), "cm"))
G_leach_kinetics  
  
```
